request.request_summary: Generate the gpt_handoff packet artifacts as a shallow, temporary ChatGPT sidecar implementation aligned to spec v0.1.3.
constraints: Treat the sidecar as shallow and temporary
Use scm.pattern as the local realization surface
Do not introduce separate plan or implement artifact families

in_scope: Human-readable packet synthesis derived from structured content
invariants: packet.definition.json is the single canonical machine-readable packet artifact
Human approval is required before realization
Formatting-only changes do not invalidate approval

gate_conditions: Semantic change after approval forces reapproval
failure_modes: schema drift between authority and packet content
rollback_path: Revise packet.definition.json and resubmit for human review

work_items.name: Define packet basis
work_items.description: Capture request, scope, control envelope, and authority references in the canonical packet definition.

work_items.name: Bind realization route
work_items.description: Create a mandatory scm.pattern binding that limits realization to the adopted local sidecar route.

work_items.name: Compute approval basis
work_items.description: Canonicalize packet.definition.json, scm.pattern.binding.json, and authority.manifest.json and compute stable SHA-256 fingerprints.

work_items.name: Render human synthesis
work_items.description: Produce packet.definition.md directly from the structured machine artifacts without adding contradictory semantics.

work_items.name: Record regeneration basis
work_items.description: Persist the required-input fingerprints so unchanged inputs do not trigger regeneration.

acceptance_conditions: All mandatory artifacts exist at repo-relative paths
Approval basis fingerprint is reproducible from canonicalized content
Human synthesis does not contradict packet.definition.json

artifacts.realization_rule: No packet may be approved, realized, or closed without a valid scm.pattern binding.

tooling.canonicalization: Stable JSON serialization with sorted keys and whitespace-insensitive hashing
execution_assumptions: Artifacts are tracked locally under generated/packets/<packet_id>
Human approval is external to ChatGPT generation

scm_pattern.realization_surface: Local realization occurs only after human approval through the adopted scm.pattern route.

regen.policy: Regeneration is blocked unless required inputs change.
regen.formatting_only_rule: Formatting-only changes do not invalidate approval.
